title: Sith fighter
content:

the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]]"[[The Betrayal of Darth Revan]]" |retired=End of the Jedi Civil War''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' |affiliation=[[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] }} {{Quote|We've got company… a small vanguard of Sith fighters, coming in hard!|Carth Onasi|}} The '''Sith fighter''', also known as the '''Sith interceptor''', was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] that formed the bulk of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Darth Malak]]'s space forces during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. ==Characteristics== [[File:Sithfighter_aft.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Sith fighter, aft view, showing engines]] The design and manufacture of the Sith fighter was a hybrid of various technologies—untraceable to any products originating from known [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]—unique to the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Space station/Legends|space-based shipyard]], the [[Star Forge]]. A single-seater [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]], with a cargo capacity of forty [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] and provisions for one [[Standard day/Legends|day]], the craft had not been designed with the comfort or safety of the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in mind. Mass-produced to be small, lightweight, and agile, the integrity of the fighter's [[Hull/Legends|hull]] was minimal, as were the life support systems. The pilot did not need to wear a full [[Environment suit/Legends|spacesuit]]; however, many chose to do so since there was a significant chance that the pilot would need to eject from a damaged craft. The fighter was powered by a prototype [[Twin ion engine/Legends|twin ion drive system]] of Rakatan origin—seen only in this design—that allowed it to reach speeds of 1,250 [[Kilometer/Legends|km]]/[[Standard hour/Legends|h]]. The power generated by the dual [[Engine/Legends|engines]] and thrusters afforded the fighter maneuverability nearly to the point of instability, therefore requiring that much of the central chassis was given to managing the reactor core for optimal performance. The Sith fighter's design consisted of a short, stubby carriage that housed the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] and subsystems. A feature exclusive to this design was the fighter's ability to to fold its wings and power down its weapon systems when docked or traversing long distances in order to conserve energy. Engaging in combat, the wings unfolded—giving the craft a maximum length of 7 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]—and the [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], one at each outward edge, were brought to bear. This allowed the fighter a broad attack arc, while its small forward and rear profiles made it difficult to target. ==Role== The manufacturing capabilities of the Star Forge allowed for the Sith fighter to be mass-produced, and the versatile design of the fighter ensured that craft were capable of being tightly packed in the cargo bays of their mothership, the [[Centurion-class battlecruiser/Legends|''Centurion''-class battlecruiser]], and launched moments after the carrier exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
[[File:FoldedSithFighters.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Sith fighters with wings folded]]
==History== The Sith fighter first appeared as Malak and Revan returned to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] as conquerors after the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. While many of their [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] were turncoat Republic vessels, the majority of their forces were made of these fighters. Produced by the [[Star Forge]], they could be easily stored in cargo bays, such that even a single mothership could deliver swarms of them into battle. Furthermore, they were quick to scramble, making them a deadly first strike. ===New Sith Wars=== Several centuries after the conclusion of the Jedi Civil War, the [[Daimanate]] forces employed their own [[Daiman's ship|starfighters]] that closely resembled Sith fighters.[[Knight Errant 0|''Knight Errant'' 0]] ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes]]'' ===Non-canon appearances=== *"[[The Betrayal of Darth Revan]]" {{C|as Sith interceptor}} {{Un}} ==Sources== [[File:Sith_fighter_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art of Sith fighter]] {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Sith fighters}} *[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] {{ID|Sith interceptor}} *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' {{ID|Sith interceptor}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{TORweb|url=holonet/galactic-history|text=Timeline 8: The Jedi Civil War|int=Timeline 8: The Jedi Civil War}} {{Hologram}} *{{DB|starship|sithfighter|Sith fighter}} *{{DB|technology|starforge|Star Forge}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sith-Interceptor |es=Interceptor Sith |nl=Sith Fighter |pl=Myśliwiec Sithów }} [[Category:Starfighter classes]] [[Category:Starship classes of the Sith]]
